diagnostic_config.description: TimeSeriesCPP AC benchmark for the selected SimBench primary grid.
diagnostic_config.timing_method: time.perf_counter wall-clock timings plus TimeSeriesCPP internal solver/preprocessing/current-flow timers
diagnostic_config.warmup_policy: one complete adapter construction and small TimeSeriesCPP solve before measured repetitions; one high-level runpp warm-up per backend before measured repetitions
diagnostic_config.timing_context_note: Descriptive E0.S3b compliance rerun only; these fresh wall-clock timings do not replace or amend the accepted G1 decision.

comparisons.label: raw timing
comparisons.expected_difference: fresh wall-clock benchmark rerun has new timestamps, hardware/runtime context, and timing measurements

comparisons.label: report
comparisons.expected_difference: runner output paths and timing values differ from the retained historical report

comparisons.label: custom evidence
comparisons.expected_difference: fresh runner reproduction records a new config path, timestamp, commit, hardware context, and output paths
